title: Launcher direct-Core routing for critical commands (suggest/skill)
title_ko: 런처 크리티컬 명령 Core 직접 라우팅
desc: suggest and skill bypass Eye entirely (isCoreDirectCmd) and route directly to Core. IOCP relay handles encoding: _needsTranscode=false -> raw byte pipe copy; true -> TranscodeStream UTF-8->CP949. --only-eye overrides to force Eye.
steps: PROBLEM: suggest/skill going through Eye pipe can fail silently when Eye is broken. These commands are critical infrastructure -- must always work regardless of Eye state.
cmd == "skill") && !onlyEye; -- added before Eye pipe block condition. Eye pipe block condition: !isCoreDirectCmd removes both commands from Eye routing.

ENCODING: Core runs as DETACHED_PROCESS -> no console -> OutputEncoding falls back to CP949 (Korean Windows). IOCP relay (IocpPipeRelay.cs line 242) handles: _needsTranscode=true -> TranscodeStream(rawStdout, _consoleCodePage) converts UTF-8 output to CP949; _needsTranscode=false (Git Bash / UTF-8 terminal) -> raw byte pipe copy (no overhead).

UTF-8 TERMINAL DETECTION (Program.cs ~line 156): isUtf8Term = (sysCP==65001) OR MSYSTEM OR TERM OR TERM_PROGRAM env vars. Git Bash sets MSYSTEM -> isUtf8Term=true -> _needsTranscode=false -> raw pipe copy.
--only-eye OVERRIDE: if --only-eye passed, isCoreDirectCmd=false -> Eye routing attempted. Useful for debugging Eye pipe issues with suggest/skill.
isFirstOutputGuardCmd: also excludes suggest+skill since they no longer hit Eye pipe; cleanup prevents stale 100ms guard logic from interfering.
author: claude
